description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a vibrant orange canvas upper and white rubber sole, featuring white laces and metal eyelets. The shoe displays bold white lettering along the side, spelling out a brand name that wraps around the heel. The toe cap is made of white rubber, and the outsole appears slightly textured for grip. The heel area is reinforced, and the interior is lined with fabric for comfort. The overall design is casual and sporty, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A bright orange low-top sneaker with white laces, bold white branding, and a white rubber sole, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange canvas upper, white laces, and partial white branding on the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel with large white letters and the back tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full white branding text and the shoe's profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white rubber toe cap and lacing area.
attribute_logo: Large white 'CONVERSE' text wraps around the heel and side of the shoe.
